LanguageData.Ammo_PlasmaCanister.label: plasma canister
LanguageData.Ammo_PlasmaCanister.description: A canister of pressurized hydrogen that serves as a containment vessel for the ionization of the gas into plasma.
LanguageData.Bullet_PlasmaPistol.label: plasma pistol bolt

LanguageData.Bullet_PlasmaCannon.label: plasma cannon bolt

LanguageData.Bullet_PlasmaRifle_Relic.label: plasma rifle bolt
LanguageData.Bullet_Laser_PlasmaDestroyer.label: plasma beam
